free_text: Energy and angular momentum transfers in equilibrium
and pre-equilibrium 158Gd(a,xn) reactions
Department of Physics
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
- Target enrichment is 99.0%.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 2.6 mg/cm**2.
- Target is self supported.
Detect prompt gamma and neutron in
coincidence.
Flight path of 48 cm
AVF cyclotron at Research Center for
Nuclear Physics
To detect gamma-rays
To detect low-energy gamma-rays
To detect neutron (NE213)
On. Converted from NRDF D0831
